/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fPIC -fno-semantic-interposition -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wno-missing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wno-nonnull -Wno-class-memaccess -Wno-redundant-move -Wno-pessimizing-move -Wno-noexcept-type -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wno-comment -Wno-misleading-indentation -Wctad-maybe-unsupported -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/link.d  -Wl,-z,nodelete -shared  -o obf_plugin.so CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/lib/plugin/plugin_vm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/lib/plugin/plugin_pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/lib/plugin/plugin_reporting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/lib/plugin/plugin_policy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/obf_plugin.dir/lib/plugin/obfuscator_plugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib64:/usr/lib64:" /usr/lib64/libLLVM.so.21.1 libobf_core.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMAnalysis.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMIRReader.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMPasses.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCFGuard.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMGlobalISel.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMSelectionDAG.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCodeGen.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCGData.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCodeGenTypes.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCoroutines.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMHipStdPar.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMipo.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMBitWriter.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMFrontendOpenMP.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMFrontendOffloading.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMObjectYAML.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMFrontendAtomic.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMFrontendDirective.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMLinker.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMIRPrinter.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMObjCARCOpts.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMScalarOpts.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMAggressiveInstCombine.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMInstCombine.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMTarget.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMVectorize.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMSandboxIR.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMInstrumentation.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMTransformUtils.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMAnalysis.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMProfileData.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMSymbolize.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoGSYM.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoPDB.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoCodeView.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoMSF.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoBTF.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoDWARF.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMObject.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMIRReader.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMAsmParser.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMBitReader.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMMCParser.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMTextAPI.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDebugInfoDWARFLowLevel.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMMC.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib64/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so
